message:
fix: guard scoring trend threshold against zero AvgScore (bd-jrm34)

scoring/tracker.go: when AvgScore is zero (all scores zero), the threshold
calculation produced NaN via 0/0 division. Now defaults to 5% minimum
threshold when AvgScore is zero, avoiding NaN in trend comparisons.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
